text.title: PM Certification Exam Changes 2026 Examples
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how the pm-certification-changes-2026 methodology converts inputs into a valid `report` artefact. Trace mirrors the decision-tree example in `06-decision-tree.xml`.

example.setting: A representative case satisfying all `Applies If` preconditions.
example.trace: diff_needed=true → eco_pdf_available=true → deltas_extracted=true → candidate action drafted → report shipped.
